title: Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple
tagline: Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Therazhundur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Therazhundur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Thirunedungalam. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Vedapureeswarar.

topPlaces.name: Therizhandur
topPlaces.description: Therazhandur is a village in the Kuthalam of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. Kambar Medu the birthplace of Tamil poet Kambar is here.

topPlaces.name: Devaadi Raja Perumal temple
topPlaces.description: The Devaadi Raja Perumal temple (Tamil: தேவாதிராஜன் பெருமாள் கோயில்) (also called Amaruviappan temple) in Therazhundur, a village in Mayiladuthurai district of the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Amaruviappan, and his consort Lakshmi as Sengamalavalli Thayar.

topPlaces.name: Kambarmedu, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Kambarmedu or Kambar Medu (Tamil: [kambarmeːɖu], ISO: Kambarimēṭu), is an archaeological site associated with the settlement of the Tamil poet Kambar. Excavations at the site were carried out by the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) and the Tamil Nadu State Department of Archaeology.

topPlaces.name: Tirunallam Umamaheswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirunallam Umamaheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located in Konerirajapuram, in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva, known here as Umamaheswarar.

topPlaces.name: Asikkadu
topPlaces.description: Asikkadu (Ahilvanam) is a village in Mayiladuthurai taluk, Mayiladuthurai district, state of Tamil Nadu, India. Asikkadu is located 5.7 km from its taluk main town Kuttalam, 9.8 km from its district headquarters Mayiladuthurai, and 232 km from its state capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Uthavedeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Uthavedeeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Kuthalam in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Kalyanasundareswarar Temple, Thiruvelvikudi
topPlaces.description: Kalyanasundareswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvelvikudi in the Kuthalam taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Vazhuvur
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Vazhuvur Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Vazhuvur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Bala Gujambigai.

items.note: Therazhandur is a village in the Kuthalam of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. Kambar Medu the birthplace of Tamil poet Kambar is here.

Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Amaruviappan, and his consort Lakshmi as Sengamalavalli Thayar.

Kambarmedu or Kambar Medu (Tamil: [kambarmeːɖu], ISO: Kambarimēṭu), is an archaeological site associated with the settlement of the Tamil poet Kambar. Excavations at the site were carried out by the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) and the Tamil Nadu State Department of Archaeology.
Tirunallam Umamaheswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located in Konerirajapuram, in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva, known here as Umamaheswarar.

Asikkadu (Ahilvanam) is a village in Mayiladuthurai taluk, Mayiladuthurai district, state of Tamil Nadu, India. Asikkadu is located 5.7 km from its taluk main town Kuttalam, 9.8 km from its district headquarters Mayiladuthurai, and 232 km from its state capital Chennai.
Uthavedeeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Kuthalam in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.
Kalyanasundareswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvelvikudi in the Kuthalam taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Shiva.

Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Vazhuvur Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Vazhuvur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Bala Gujambigai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (100 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (101 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Therazhundur Vedapureeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Therizhandur, Devaadi Raja Perumal temple, Kambarmedu, Mayiladuthurai, Tirunallam Umamaheswarar Temple, Asikkadu.
